user.title: Polestar (PCCS)
user.description: Enter the VIN of the Polestar you want to track. You can find it on your registration documents, or in the Polestar app under “Car info”.

login.title: Sign in with Polestar ID
login.description:
1. Open this URL in any browser and sign in with your Polestar ID:

[Sign in to Polestar ID]({auth_url})

2. After you sign in, the browser will try to redirect to a URL starting with `polestar-explore://` and will fail with “unknown protocol” — that is expected.

3. Copy the **full** URL from the browser's address bar and paste it below.

error.auth: Authentication failed. Double-check that you pasted the full redirected URL.
error.connection: Could not reach Polestar ID. Check your internet connection and try again.
